## Types of changes

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Enhancement (non-breaking which updates existing code)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` pass).
- [ ] I have built the card (`npm run build`) and committed the updated `dist/` bundle.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where relevant (`npm run test` passes).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README if needed.
